rows.trigger: Visible account, channel, public profile, or edit permission does not match the intended LoveTypes platform identity.
rows.stop: Do not set profile link, do not publish, and do not write back profile status.
rows.recovery: Switch to the correct account, rerun platform account identity checklist, then capture a traceable proof note.
rows.operatorAction: If trigger appears, follow stop condition first, then recovery condition.

rows.trigger: Profile link is not the planned /start/ UTM URL, is missing, or cannot be clicked from the public profile.
rows.stop: Do not mark profile set/live and do not publish first-batch posts.
rows.recovery: Fix the profile link, verify it opens lovetypes.tw/start/ with UTM preserved, then run profile text import check/add.
rows.operatorAction: If trigger appears, follow stop condition first, then recovery condition.

rows.trigger: A first-batch post is about to publish while ready_to_publish is false.
rows.stop: Cancel or leave draft/scheduled; do not publish manually around the gate.
rows.recovery: Complete all active profile rows, refresh launch readiness, then use the first-batch publish action sheet.
rows.operatorAction: If trigger appears, follow stop condition first, then recovery condition.

rows.trigger: Post URL exists but is private, draft-only, login-only, or not reachable from a public browser.
rows.stop: Do not write back post_url as published and do not count KPI.
rows.recovery: Make the post public or replace with the correct public URL, then rerun public-post-url checks.
rows.operatorAction: If trigger appears, follow stop condition first, then recovery condition.

rows.trigger: Post URL domain does not match the active platform row, or URL points to the wrong post.
rows.stop: Do not write back; do not reuse the URL in weekly review.
rows.recovery: Find the correct public post URL for the platform row and rerun post text import check.
rows.operatorAction: If trigger appears, follow stop condition first, then recovery condition.

rows.trigger: Caption/profile first action emphasizes Luna, affiliate books, paid products, or purchase before the quiz.
rows.stop: Do not publish, or edit immediately before public verification/writeback.
rows.recovery: Restore the single primary CTA: complete the 15-question quiz and find the emotional guardian.
rows.operatorAction: If trigger appears, follow stop condition first, then recovery condition.

rows.trigger: site_clicks, quiz_starts, or quiz_completions is entered as 0 without a checked analytics/platform source.
rows.stop: Do not run weekly review and do not change commerce or content priority.
rows.recovery: Check analytics source, add proof note, then rerun zero KPI evidence checklist.
rows.operatorAction: If trigger appears, follow stop condition first, then recovery condition.

rows.trigger: Same platform receives a duplicate first-batch post, wrong script, wrong slot, or wrong guardian.
rows.stop: Do not write back as the planned task until operator decides keep/delete/repost.
rows.recovery: If keeping, document exact task mapping; if deleting/reposting, only write back the final public post URL.
rows.operatorAction: If trigger appears, follow stop condition first, then recovery condition.

rows.trigger: Comment/email asks for crisis support, diagnosis, therapy replacement, or sensitive personal data handling.
rows.stop: Do not treat as promotion KPI or product lead.
rows.recovery: Use safety-bounded reply; direct to appropriate emergency/local professional support where relevant.
rows.operatorAction: If trigger appears, follow stop condition first, then recovery condition.

rows.trigger: Offer order, paid CTA, Luna emphasis, affiliate emphasis, or winning guardian is changed while empty-data mode is true.
rows.stop: Revert the commerce/content-priority change and keep collect_signal focus.
rows.recovery: Wait until first-batch evidence, KPI rows, weekly review and decision gates are ready.
rows.operatorAction: If trigger appears, follow stop condition first, then recovery condition.
